fields.name: Buy-from Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the vendor that you shipped the items on the credit memo to.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Pay-to Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the vendor that you received the credit memo from.

fields.name: Pay-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the vendor who you received the invoice from.

fields.name: Pay-to Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the vendor who you received the credit memo from.

fields.name: Pay-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the vendor that you received the credit memo from.

fields.name: Pay-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: Pay-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the vendor on the purchase document.

fields.name: Pay-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the person you should contact at the vendor who you received the credit memo from.

fields.name: Your Reference
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the vendor's reference.
The program copies the reference from the Your Reference field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the reference because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Ship-to Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for an alternate shipment address if you want to ship to another address than the one that has been entered automatically. This field is also used in case of drop shipment.

fields.name: Ship-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the company at the address to which the items in the purchase order were shipped.

fields.name: Ship-to Name 2
fields.tooltip:
Contains an additional name of the company at the address to which the items in the purchase order were shipped.
It is used when the items ordered are shipped either to a different address than your company address or directly to a customer, in connection with a sales order.
The program copies the name from the Ship-to Name 2 field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the name because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Ship-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address that the items in the purchase order were shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: Ship-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the vendor on the purchase document.

fields.name: Ship-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date the purchase header was posted.

fields.name: Expected Receipt Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date when the shipment was received.
The program copies the date from the Expected Receipt Date field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the date because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Posting Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies any text that is entered to accompany the posting, for example for information to auditors.

fields.name: Payment Terms Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code to use to find the payment terms that apply to the purchase header.
The program copies the payment terms code from the Payment Terms Code field on the purchase header.
The payment terms are used to calculate the due date and payment discount date from the document date and to find payment discount percentages.
You cannot change the payment terms code because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the credit memo is due. The program calculates the date using the Payment Terms Code and Posting Date fields on the purchase header.

fields.name: Payment Discount %
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the payment discount percentage that will be given if you pay for the purchase on or before the date in the Pmt. Discount Date field.
The program copies the payment discount percentage from the Payment Discount % field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the payment discount percentage because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Pmt. Discount Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the last date on which you can pay the credit memo and still receive a payment discount.
The program copies the discount date from the Pmt. Discount Date field on the purchase header.
After you post orders, invoices and credit memos, the program uses the due date to identify the vendors whose bills are due when you run the Suggest Vendor Payments batch job.
You cannot change the discount date because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Shipment Method Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code that represents the shipment method for this credit memo.
The program copies the shipping method code from the Shipment Method Code field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the shipping method code because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the location used when you posted the credit memo.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Vendor Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's market type to link business transactions made for the vendor with the appropriate account in the general ledger.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code used to calculate the amounts on the credit memo.

fields.name: Currency Factor
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Prices Including VAT
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the purchase prices on the credit memo lines include VAT.
The program copies the information from the Prices Including VAT field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Invoice Disc. Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code that will be used to find the invoice discount granted on the credit memo.
The program copies the code from the Invoice Disc. Code field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the code because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Language Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the language used in the credit memo.
The program copies the code from the Language Code field on the purchase header.
The language code made it possible for the items on the purchase line to be written in the vendor's language.
You cannot change the code because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Purchaser Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which purchaser is assigned to the vendor.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether a comment has been entered for this purchase credit memo header.
To view a comment or create a new one, click Related Information, point to Credit Memo, and then click Comments. The Purch. Comment Sheet window will appear. You can see the existing comments and create new ones.
You can also enter a comment in the Notes FactBox.

fields.name: No. Printed
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many times the document has been printed.

fields.name: On Hold
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the posted credit memo will be taken into account in the payment suggestion when the purchase header has been posted and you run the Suggest Vendor Payments batch job.
Before posting you can enter your initials - or whatever you like - in the field. This marks it so that the credit memo will be put on hold after you post it.
If the field contains something (is not blank), the entry will not be included when you run the Suggest Vendor Payments batch job. The field will show that the credit memo is waiting for approval. If the field is blank, the program will take note of the credit memo when it makes a payment suggestion.
The field can be changed on the vendor ledger entry after posting.

fields.name: Applies-to Doc. Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the posted document that this document or journal line will be applied to when you post, for example to register payment.

fields.name: Applies-to Doc. No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the posted document that this document or journal line will be applied to when you post, for example to register payment.

fields.name: Bal. Account No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the general ledger account or bank account to which a balancing entry for the credit memo was posted.
The program copies the number from the Bal. Account No. field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the account number because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total, in the currency of the credit memo, of the amounts on all the credit memo lines.

fields.name: Amount Including VAT
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the amounts, including VAT, on all the lines on the document.

fields.name: Vendor Cr. Memo No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's number for this credit memo.

fields.name: VAT Registration No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the vendor's VAT registration number.
The program copies the number from the VAT Registration No. field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the number because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Sell-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of your customer to whom the vendor shipped the items directly. This field is used only when the credit memo line is for a drop shipment.
The program copies the number from the Sell-to Customer No. field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the number because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the reason code that is associated with the credit memo.
The program copies the reason code from the Reason Code field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the code because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the general business posting group code that is assigned to the vendor that you received the credit memo from.
The program copies the code from the Gen. Bus. Posting Group field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the code because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Transaction Type
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transaction type of the purchase header that this line was posted from.
The program copies the transaction type from the Transaction Type field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the transaction type because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Transport Method
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transport method of the purchase header that this line was posted from.
The program copies the transport method from the Transport Method field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the transport method because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: VAT Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip:
Shows the vendor's VAT country/region code.
The program copies the VAT country/region code from the VAT Country/Region Code field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the VAT country/region code because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Buy-from Vendor Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the vendor who delivered the items.

fields.name: Buy-from Vendor Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the vendor that you’re buying from.

fields.name: Buy-from Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the vendor who shipped the items.

fields.name: Buy-from Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: Buy-from City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the vendor on the purchase document.

fields.name: Buy-from Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the person to contact at the vendor who shipped the items.

fields.name: Pay-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: Pay-to County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county as a part of the address.

fields.name: Pay-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the address.

fields.name: Buy-from Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: Buy-from County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county as a part of the address.

fields.name: Buy-from Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the vendor who delivered the items.

fields.name: Ship-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: Ship-to County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county as a part of the address.

fields.name: Ship-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Bal. Account Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the balancing account type used in the credit memo.
The program copies the balancing account type from the Bal. Account Type field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the type because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Order Address Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the order address of the related vendor.

fields.name: Entry Point
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code of the port of entry where the items pass into your country/region.
The program copies the code from the Entry Point field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the code because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Correction
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry was posted as a corrective entry.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related document was created.

fields.name: Area
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the area code used in the credit memo.
The program copies the code from the Area field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the code because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Transaction Specification
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the transaction specification that was used in the credit memo.
The program copies the code from the Transaction Specification field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the code because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Payment Method Code
fields.tooltip:
Describes the method of payment for payments to vendors. The program has copied the code from the Payment Method Code field on the purchase header.
You cannot change or delete the code because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Pre-Assigned No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the number series that was used to assign a number to the purchase credit memo from which the posted purchase credit memo was created.
The program automatically copies this field from the No. Series field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the pre-assigned number series because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the number series that was used to assign a number to the posted credit memo.
The program automatically copies this field from the Posting No. Series field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the number series because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Pre-Assigned No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the credit memo that the posted credit memo was created from.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the ID of the user who posted the credit memo.
You cannot change the user ID because the credit memo has been posted.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the source code that is linked to the purchase credit memo header.
The program copies the source code from either the Purchases field or the Deleted Document field in the Source Code Setup table.
You cannot change the source code because the entry has been posted.

fields.name: Tax Area Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the tax area code of the vendor.
The program copies the code from the Tax Area Code field on the purchase header.

fields.name: Tax Liable
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that purchases from the vendor on the purchase header was liable to sales tax.
The program copies the code from the Tax Liable field on the purchase header.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the VAT business posting group of the vendor.
The program copies the code from the VAT Bus. Posting Group field on the purchase header.

fields.name: VAT Base Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage to use to discount the VAT element if a payment discount is to be posted. The value is validated against the maximum possible VAT Tolerance % field value in the General Ledger Setup. The maximum value cannot be overridden with the exception of a credit note where you can manually enter the value used for the payment discount.

fields.name: Prepmt. Cr. Memo No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code for the number series that was used to assign a number to the posted prepayment credit memo if the credit memo is a prepayment credit memo.
The program automatically copies this field from the Prepayment No. Series field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the number series because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Prepayment Credit Memo
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the document is a prepayment credit memo.

fields.name: Prepayment Order No.
fields.tooltip: Shows the purchase order number that the original prepayment invoice was posted from if the document is a prepayment credit memo.

fields.name: VAT Reporting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT date on the invoice.

fields.name: Ship-to Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the telephone number of the company's shipping address.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.


Additional Information


You cannot change the contents of this field. Click the drop-down arrow to see the combination of posted dimension values.


The value 0 represents an empty dimension set.

fields.name: Paid
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the posted purchase invoice that relates to this purchase credit memo is paid. The check box will also be selected if a credit memo for the remaining amount has been applied.

fields.name: Remaining Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that remains to be paid for the posted purchase invoice that relates to this purchase credit memo.

fields.name: Vendor Ledger Entry No.
fields.tooltip:
Used to determine if the posted purchase invoice that relates to this purchase credit memo is paid.
The state is shown in the Paid field on the posted purchase invoice.

fields.name: Invoice Discount Amount
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the amount that is calculated and shown in the Invoice Discount Amount field at the bottom of purchase credit memos.
Specifies the amount that is deducted from the value shown in the Total Amount Incl. VAT field.
If you have set up invoice discounts for the vendor, then the specified percentage value is automatically inserted in the Vendor Invoice Discount % field if the criteria are met. The calculated discount amount is inserted in the Invoice Discount Amount field, but you can change it manually. For more information, see How to: Set Up Invoice Discount Terms.

fields.name: Cancelled
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the posted purchase invoice that relates to this purchase credit memo has been either corrected or canceled.

fields.name: Corrective
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the posted purchase invoice has been either corrected or canceled by this purchase credit memo .

fields.name: Campaign No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the campaign that the document is linked to.

fields.name: Buy-from Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact who you sent the purchase credit memo to.

fields.name: Pay-to Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact at the vendor who handles the credit memo.

fields.name: Responsibility Center
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the responsibility center that serves the vendor on this purchase document.

fields.name: Return Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the purchase return order that the purchase credit memo is related to.

fields.name: Return Order No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series that was used to assign a number to the purchase return order that the purchase credit memo is related to.
